The Blind Spot

We track everything — steps, calories, sleep, heart rate.
But we ignore the one system that controls how we think, feel, and perform.

📱

We Track Everything External

Steps. Calories. Sleep. Heart rate. Thousands of data points — all pointing outward.

⚡

But Ignore What Matters Most

The one internal system that controls how we think, feel, and perform — our breath — goes completely unmeasured.

⏱️

We Act Without Checking Our State

You check your phone battery before leaving. You check the time before a meeting. But not your internal state before decisions.

What you track today
⌚ Wearable heart rate + steps
📊 Sleep score + calories
📲 Screen time + notifications
📈 Productivity apps + habits
What you're missing
🫁 Your real-time internal state
🧠 Which brain hemisphere is dominant
🎯 Whether you're ready to act — or not
🔄 How to shift your state on demand
A New Approach

The shift changes everything.

Because two people with the same skill can produce completely different results — based solely on their internal state.

The Old Way
Act first

React to outcomes
Repeat without insight

The BRemind Way

Align your breath

Right State → Right Action → Better Outcome.
This is not inspiration. It's a system.

The Metric

Breath Quotient
BQ

Just like IQ measures intelligence and EQ measures emotional awareness — BQ measures your breathing intelligence, in real time.

It tells you exactly what you need, before you need it.

🔵

What state you are in

Calm-focused, reactive, depleted, or peak performance — identified instantly.

🧠

Which brain hemisphere is dominant

Left (analytical) or right (creative/intuitive) — your breath reveals this in seconds.

🎯

How ready you are to act

A precise readiness score so you know whether to proceed, pause, or shift state first.

⚡

What to do next

AI-generated, state-specific action guidance — not generic advice, but your next optimal move.

The Engine

How BQ works in real time

Three precise steps. Under two minutes. Before every decision that matters.

01

Detect

Guided breath detection analyses your breathing pattern, rhythm, and nostril dominance in real time.

02

Analyze

The system calculates your BQ score — identifying your exact internal state and brain hemisphere dominance.

03

Guide

You receive a state-specific action recommendation: proceed as-is, shift state first, or activate a targeted protocol.

Smart Alarms & Nudge System Built-in

BRemind doesn't wait for you to remember. It watches your patterns, tracks your alignment windows, and reaches out — precisely when your breath matters most.

Smart Breath Alarms

Set once — BRemind schedules your daily check-ins around your calendar, sunrise time, and lunar windows. No manual reminders needed. The alarm knows when your breath matters most.

Sunrise-synced Calendar-aware Custom windows

Pre-Event Nudges

Connect your calendar and BRemind sends a contextual nudge before every meeting, presentation, or deep work block — with your current BQ score and a one-tap alignment option.

Calendar sync Live BQ in notification One-tap align
📉

Drift Detection

BRemind learns your personal rhythm. When you go too long without a check-in — or your pattern suggests you're drifting — it sends a gentle nudge to bring you back on track.

Pattern learning Non-intrusive Adaptive frequency
🌒

Lunar Window Alerts

Every day has optimal breath training windows based on the lunar phase, sunrise, and moonrise. BRemind notifies you when your window opens — so you never miss a peak alignment moment.

End-of-Day Report

Each evening, a summary notification: your average BQ, streak status, top improvement, and tomorrow's lunar guide — keeping you informed without demanding constant attention.

Daily digest Streak tracking Tomorrow's plan
The System

Knowing your state is step one.
Improving it is everything.

BRemind doesn't stop at awareness. Based on your BQ reports, the system generates personalized daily practices designed to improve what actually moves the needle.

🔵

IQ Sharpens Thinking

Clarity, focus, and analytical precision. Your left-brain performance — measurably improved.

🟠

EQ Emotional Control

Balance, regulation, and interpersonal awareness. Stop reacting. Start responding.

🟣

CQ Decision Intelligence

High-stakes decision-making under pressure. Think clearly when it matters most.

The Foundation

Ancient wisdom.
Modern science.

BRemind transforms millennia of breath knowledge and modern neuroscience into a real-time performance system.

Layer 1 — Ancient Intelligence

Swara Yoga & Breath Systems

Ancient systems understood the connection between breath patterns, brain dominance, and mental state long before modern science could measure it.

Layer 2 — Modern Neuroscience

Breath, Cognition & Emotion

Research confirms that breath directly regulates the prefrontal cortex, nervous system, and emotional processing — affecting every decision you make.

Layer 3 — Real-Time Application

BRemind Performance System

These two bodies of knowledge, unified into a measurable, trainable daily system. Not theory — a live performance tool.

This is not another wellness app.

New Feature
Lunar Alignment — Coming Soon

Your breath follows
cosmic rhythms.

Ancient Swara Yoga mapped the relationship between breath, the lunar calendar, sunrise, moonrise — and your mental state. BRemind brings this 5,000-year-old intelligence into a real-time daily guide.

🌅

Sunrise & Moonrise Tracking

The app reads your local sunrise and moonrise times daily and cross-references them with your breath pattern — alerting you when your state is or isn't aligned with the natural cycle.

🌒

Lunar Calendar Intelligence

New moon, full moon, waxing and waning phases each influence which nostril and brain hemisphere should naturally be dominant. BRemind tells you what's expected — and whether you're in sync.

🧭

Guided Daily Alignment Protocol

Each morning, receive a personalised cosmic context card: today's lunar phase, your expected dominant breath, and a specific practice to align your state with the day's natural rhythm.

Why this matters for performance

When your breath aligns with the lunar-solar cycle, ancient systems observed peak cognitive and physical performance. Modern chronobiology is beginning to confirm the same. BRemind is the first app to make this measurable and actionable — daily.

Lunar Phase → Breath Guidance

🌑
New Moon
Rest & Reset
Alternate nostril breathing. Rest the system. Ideal for introspection, not high output.
🌒
Waxing Crescent
Build & Begin
Right nostril activation. Initiate new projects, push for clarity and action.
🌕
Full Moon
Peak & Perform
Both nostrils balanced. Highest cognitive + emotional capacity. Ideal for critical decisions.
🌘
Waning Gibbous
Reflect & Refine
Left nostril dominant. Deep analysis, emotional processing, and learning consolidation.

Questions

Frequently asked.

What is Breath Quotient (BQ) — and how is it different from breathing exercises?
+
BQ is a real-time measurement of your breathing intelligence — like IQ measures cognitive ability and EQ measures emotional awareness. It doesn't just ask you to breathe slowly. It identifies which internal state you're in, which brain hemisphere is dominant, and what kind of action you're ready for. It's a diagnostic and performance tool, not a relaxation technique.
How does BRemind actually measure my breath?
+
BRemind uses guided breath detection to analyse your breathing pattern, rhythm, and nostril dominance in real time. Based on this, the system calculates your BQ score and identifies your current internal state — calm-focused, reactive, depleted, or peak performance — within under two minutes.
How much time does this take each day?
+
A full BQ check-in takes under 2 minutes. Daily training practices are 5–10 minutes and can be done before a key meeting, study session, or at the start of your morning. BRemind is built for busy, high-performance schedules — not for people who have an hour to meditate.
Is there science behind this?
+
Yes. BRemind is grounded in two bodies of knowledge: modern neuroscience (which shows breath directly regulates the nervous system, prefrontal cortex activity, and emotional response) and Swara Yoga, an ancient system that mapped the relationship between breath patterns and mental state. BRemind applies both into a single, real-time performance tool.
How is BRemind different from Calm, Headspace, or Wim Hof?
+
Those tools calm you down. BRemind prepares and upgrades you. Calm and Headspace offer generic, scheduled relaxation. Wim Hof focuses on cold + intense breathwork for resilience. BRemind is a real-time state intelligence system — it reads where you are, then gives you a specific protocol to shift into the state you need for what you're about to do.
Does BRemind track progress over time?
+
Yes. Your BQ score, state patterns, and training consistency are tracked daily. Over time, you'll see how your default state shifts — whether your baseline is trending toward high performance, and which areas (IQ, EQ, or CQ) are improving fastest. The goal is a permanently elevated default state.
When should I use BRemind during my day?
+
Before high-stakes moments: a negotiation, a presentation, a difficult conversation, or a deep work session. Also effective first thing in the morning to set your operating state for the day, and at the end of the day to train and reset. Think of it as a performance pre-flight check — not a relaxation tool.
When will BRemind be available and how do I get early access?
+
BRemind is currently in its early access phase. By joining the waitlist above, you'll be among the first to get access when we launch — and your performance challenge data helps us personalise your onboarding experience from day one.
